languages.text: {n}Капитан Дунавски откладывает в сторону кусок свежеснятой кожи и отдает честь:{/n} "Ваша Светлость, чем могу помочь?"
{n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан Дунавски откладывает в сторону кусок свежеснятой кожи и отдает честь:{/n} "Ваша Светлость, чем могу помочь?"

{n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"
{n}Upon seeing you, Captain Dunawski draws herself up straight and salutes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what can I do for you?"
{n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"

{n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"

languages.text: {n}あなたを見るや、ダナウスキ艦長は背筋を正して敬礼する。{/n} 「{mf|閣下|閣下}、ご用命は？」
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing you, Captain Dunawski draws herself up straight and salutes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what can I do for you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたを見るや、ダナウスキ艦長は背筋を正して敬礼する。{/n} 「{mf|閣下|閣下}、ご用命は？」

languages.text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski met de côté un morceau de peau fraîchement excisé et vous salue.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, en quoi puis-je vous aider ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski met de côté un morceau de peau fraîchement excisé et vous salue.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, en quoi puis-je vous aider ? »

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski, az önce çıkarılmış bir deri parçasını bir kenara bırakıp seni selamlıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, size nasıl hizmet edebilirim?"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski, az önce çıkarılmış bir deri parçasını bir kenara bırakıp seni selamlıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, size nasıl hizmet edebilirim?"

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski legt ein frisch entferntes Stück Haut beiseite und salutiert vor dir.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wie kann ich Euch dienen?"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski legt ein frisch entferntes Stück Haut beiseite und salutiert vor dir.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wie kann ich Euch dienen?"

languages.text: {n}La capitana Dunawski aparta una tira de piel recién separada y se cuadra.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¿en qué puedo servirle?».
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitana Dunawski aparta una tira de piel recién separada y se cuadra.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¿en qué puedo servirle?».

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉把一条刚剥下来的皮搁到一旁，向你敬礼。{/n}“舰长大人，有什么能为您效劳的？”
